notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Michael Busch out at 2nd. Alex Bregman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Moisés Ballesteros out at 2nd. Matt Shaw out at 1st.
